# H1 — Document Title

The largest heading. On graphics terminals it shows in the **largest font**; otherwise it is bold + blue + a heavy underline (═).

## H2 — Section

Second level. Large font / bold + teal + a light underline (─).

### H3 — Subsection

Third level. Medium font / green + a `◆` marker + bold.

#### H4 — Item

Fourth level. Small font / yellow + a `▸` marker + bold.

##### H5 — Detail

Fifth level. Smaller font / red + a `•` marker.

###### H6 — Note

Sixth level (for notes). Magenta + a `·` marker + dim.

---

## Level comparison (on one screen)

# H1 Heading
## H2 Heading
### H3 Heading
#### H4 Heading
##### H5 Heading

The five lines above are each distinguished by **size (graphics mode)** or by **color and decoration (text mode)**.
